draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"FRESH RICOTTA","yield_phrase":"ABOUT 1 CUP"},"steps":[{"instruction":"1. Line a colander with four layers of cheesecloth or two layers of food-safe paper towels and set over a large bowl. Combine the milk, salt, and vinegar in a microwave-safe 2-quart liquid measure and microwave on high until lightly bubbling around the edges, 4 to 6 minutes; the milk should register about 165°F on an instant-read thermometer. Remove from the microwave and stir gently for 5 seconds. The milk should separate into solid white curds and translucent liquid whey. If not, microwave for 30 seconds longer and stir again. If necessary repeat until fully separated.","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"4 cups whole milk"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1/2 teaspoon table salt"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1/4 cup distilled white vinegar or lemon juice (from 2 lemons)"}]}]}
